content.query:
create view silver_users_vw
as
SELECT *
FROM OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'https://ckrsynstorage.dfs.core.windows.net/silver/users_cleaned/',
    FORMAT = 'DELTA'
) AS [result];

--drop view silver_transactions

create view silver_transactions_vw
as
SELECT *
FROM OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'https://ckrsynstorage.dfs.core.windows.net/silver/transactions_cleaned/',
    FORMAT = 'DELTA'
) AS [result];

create view silver_cards_vw
as
SELECT *
FROM OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'https://ckrsynstorage.dfs.core.windows.net/silver/cards_cleaned/',
    FORMAT = 'DELTA'
) AS [result];


select * from silver_users_vw

select * from silver_transactions_vw

select * from silver_cards_vw
